zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew I de Louvain於大約1199年出生在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓時，他的父親Godfrey de Louvain26歲，母親Lady Alice de Hastings20歲。他於1220年與Muriel De Braose在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1262年11月11日之前在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew I de Louvain于大约1199年出生在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓时，他的父亲Godfrey de Louvain26岁，母亲Lady Alice de Hastings20岁。他于1220年与Muriel De Braose在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1262年11月11日之前在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew I de Louvain was born about 1199, in Little Easton, Essex, England, his father, Godfrey de Louvain, was 26 and his mother, Lady Alice de Hastings, was 20. He married Muriel De Braose in 1220, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 11 November 1262, in Little Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew I de Louvainが約1199年にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで生まれた時，父Godfrey de Louvainは26歳，母Lady Alice de Hastingsは20歳であった。1220年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでMuriel De Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1262年11月11日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew I de Louvain(이)가 대략 1199년 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey de Louvain(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Hastings(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Muriel De Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 11월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Muriel De Braose em 1220, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew I de Louvain родился около 1199 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Godfrey de Louvain было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Hastings, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriel De Braose в 1220 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 11 ноябрь 1262 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
